name: decision_making
success_criteria: A decision is made, documented with full rationale, and communicated to stakeholders.

tasks.title: Define decision criteria
tasks.description: List the criteria that will govern the decision. Assign relative weights. Confirm with decision owners.

tasks.title: Identify options
tasks.description: Generate a complete list of candidate options. Include at least one 'do nothing' option for baseline.

tasks.title: Evaluate options
tasks.description: Score each option against the weighted criteria. Document evidence for each score.

tasks.title: Stakeholder check
tasks.description: Validate options against stakeholder constraints and political considerations not captured in criteria.

tasks.title: Select
tasks.description: Choose the winning option based on evaluation scores and stakeholder input. Record the final decision.

tasks.title: Document rationale
tasks.description: Write a decision record: what was decided, why, what was rejected and why, and who approved.
